title: Lenalch Music
description: A small resource pack that replaces music on music discs with Lenalch's music.
body:
A small resource pack that replaces music on music discs with Lenalch's music. There are currently nine tracks in the resource pack. All tracks belong to Lenalch, except one.

NOTE: The track "Darkness" is a requested track written by but not owned by Lenalch. But the owner allowed it's use in the resource pack
